response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience across many languages and domains, but lacks the core requirements for this role: no recent or substantial C++ professional experience (only a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no Windows platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain background. The profile is mismatched with a C++/finance specialist role.
strengths: Strong general software engineering background with 10+ years of experience
Familiar with C++ from prior National Instruments work
Demonstrated communication skills through workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, over 10 years ago
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure
No demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform development experience

key_factors.factor: Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows stack
